ogTitle: Wehla vs Welshmans Reef: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wehla and Welshmans Reef.
heading: Wehla vs Welshmans Reef — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wehla, Victoria and Welshmans Reef, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wehla has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Welshmans Reef (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wehla or Welshmans Reef safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wehla has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Welshmans Reef scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wehla scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Welshmans Reef scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wehla or Welshmans Reef?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wehla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
